message:
fix(web): Stabilize dashboard hook dependencies and fix notification type

useDashboard Hook Stability (useDashboard.ts):
- Adds dashboardRef to track current dashboard without triggering
  re-renders when passed to callbacks
- fetchWidgetData() and refreshAllWidgets() now use ref instead of
  state dependency, preventing timer reset loops
- Auto-refresh effect now depends on dashboard.id, not entire object
- Widget timer effect uses JSON.stringify of minimal config
  (id + interval) to detect meaningful changes only
- Adds biome-ignore comment for intentional non-exhaustive deps
- Fixes getDashboard in useEffect dependency array

These changes prevent:
- Infinite re-render loops when widgets update
- Timer restarts on unrelated state changes
- Stale closure issues in interval callbacks

useNotifications Type Fix (useNotifications.ts):
- useUnreadCount() was casting response to wrong type
- Changed from { data: { count } } to NotificationListResponse
- Now correctly reads unreadCount from actual API response shape

Both fixes improve React hook correctness and API contract alignment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
